seasons.title: Total Drama:Heroes VS Villains VS Civilians
seasons.subtitle: Good VS Evil VS Civilians

winner.name: Alejandro & Cameron
winner.keyStats: First dual winners in franchise history — 4-4 jury tie. Alejandro: 4 individual immunities, 7 total challenge wins, 2 votes against. Cameron: survived extreme hatred from MacArthur, 7 votes against.
winner.strategy: Alejandro managed shields (Pete → Leshawna → Sanders) and dominated challenges. Cameron survived as the indispensable brain no one could cut. Together they outlasted the Civilian Hegemony.
winner.legacy: First co-winners in franchise history. Alejandro becomes the franchise's only two-time champion.

seasons.theme: The Best Heroes The Worst Villains and the Newbies
